---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, date, title, description, reading-time]
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: [title, date]
  categories: true
  feed: true
format:
  html:
    smooth-scroll: true
---
{{< animate zoomIn "A dedicated space for me to rant!" duration=2s >}}
